ItacPersonItem.Notes: Active in Bologna in the period 1555-1557. The dates have been taken from edit16. A biograpical sketch through his letters can be found in Ester Pastrorello, L`epistolario manuziano. Inventario cronologico-analitico 1483-1597 (1957)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
